description: Schema definition for MADSci Location Manager MongoDB

locations.description: Locations managed by this Location Manager

representation_templates.description: Named representation templates for node-specific location data

indexes.name: repr_template_name_unique
indexes.description: Unique constraint on representation template names

indexes.name: repr_template_id_unique
indexes.description: Unique constraint on representation template IDs

location_templates.description: Named location templates for creating locations from blueprints

indexes.name: loc_template_name_unique
indexes.description: Unique constraint on location template names

indexes.name: loc_template_id_unique
indexes.description: Unique constraint on location template IDs
